hero.badge: ✨ FREE DEMO OFFER FOR YOUR BUSINESS
hero.headline: Get Your Business Demo Website or App
hero.subheading: We design and develop premium, high-converting websites, mobile apps, e-commerce stores, and booking systems custom-tailored to your business. Request a live, interactive demo for free — absolutely zero upfront payment required!

business_types.title: Select Your Business Type
business_types.subtitle: Choose your industry to see our tailored digital templates and custom features

form.desc_placeholder: Tell us a bit about what your business does, your target clients, etc.
form.notes_placeholder: Any specific requests, integrations, or questions?

validation.email: Please enter a valid email address
validation.phone: Please enter a valid phone number

success.title: Demo Request Submitted!
success.msg1: Thank you! Your demo request has been registered under ID:
success.msg2: Our team is already reviewing your details. We will contact you on WhatsApp or Call within 24-48 hours to present your interactive demo.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Trusted by hundreds of local shops, clinics, schools, and restaurants worldwide.
testimonials.text_restaurant: They built an amazing e-commerce app for our restaurant in just a week! Our orders went up by 40%. The free demo convinced us immediately.
testimonials.text_gym: Highly professional team. The gym booking system operates smoothly. Clients love booking classes on our custom Android app.
testimonials.text_clinic: A custom clinic website that has significantly reduced phone bookings. The automated SMS alerts work like a charm.

portfolio.title: Our Work Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Explore real examples of premium websites and mobile apps we designed for growing businesses.
portfolio.desc_restaurant: Modern online ordering layout with quick add-to-cart, cart sync, and WhatsApp order alerts.
portfolio.desc_salon: Seamless responsive booking interface with staff schedules, service selectors, and SMS triggers.
portfolio.desc_realestate: Interactive map search, high-resolution photo slider, agent filters, and lead contact forms.

footer.cta_desc: Transform your business with a stunning online presence today.
